capability.evidenceSummary: Direct product.query lookup can resolve the single internal product ID status.

routing.evidenceSummary: parseBotIntent reaches query_product and handleBotIntent returns text.

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct same-SKU ranking can identify the best R50 link by 20-day amount metadata.

routing.evidenceSummary: The existing ability passes, but the natural-language bot surface does not reliably dispatch this query without planner routing.

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct reportQuery can read the summary report context.

routing.evidenceSummary: parseBotIntent reaches latest_summary and handleBotIntent returns text when report context exists.

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct windowAggregate can aggregate the 15-day exposure window.

routing.evidenceSummary: Capability passes, but the natural-language entrypoint does not reliably route zero-exposure window questions to the aggregate tool.

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct windowAggregate can aggregate the 20-day amount window.

routing.evidenceSummary: Capability passes, but NL routing does not reliably map the amount-zero window wording to the aggregate tool.

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct windowAggregate can aggregate the 30-day order window.

routing.evidenceSummary: Capability passes, but the bot surface does not reliably map order-zero phrasing to the correct window metric.

cases.utterance: 为什么R50一个候选都没有

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct candidate explanation can report skip and candidate reasons for R50.

routing.evidenceSummary: Capability passes, but NL routing may choose a broader workflow or reject instead of the explanation tool.

cases.utterance: 这个同款组能不能补链

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct safeSourceResolve can evaluate refill safety when sameSkuGroupId and excluded IDs are supplied.

routing.evidenceSummary: The utterance depends on prior same-SKU context; missing metadata blocks reliable NL dispatch.

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct safeSourceResolve can identify a safe source when group and exclusion metadata are known.

routing.evidenceSummary: The short phrase lacks the same-SKU group and excluded product metadata required for routing.

cases.utterance: 帮我下架r50近30天产生订单金额为0的链接

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct refreshActivityPlan can produce a targeted R50 strategy card without executing writes.

routing.evidenceSummary: Capability passes, but natural language without planner support does not reliably produce the refresh plan.

cases.utterance: 帮我下架pocket3近30天产生订单金额为0的链接

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct refreshActivityPlan can produce a Pocket 3 targeted strategy card.

routing.evidenceSummary: Capability passes, but alias and group resolution are not stable through the current NL route.

cases.utterance: 帮我下架近30天产生订单金额为0的链接

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct refreshActivityPlan can prepare a global strategy-card plan.

routing.evidenceSummary: The broad natural-language request must remain a bounded planning workflow and not bypass confirmation.

cases.utterance: 只下架近30天产生订单金额为0的链接

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct refreshActivityPlan can prepare a delist-only strategy-card confirmation entry.

routing.evidenceSummary: Execution wording must not skip strategy selection and confirmation workflow boundaries.

cases.utterance: 帮我下架所有近30天产生订单金额为0的链接,除了没有可用的安全源商品,并且下掉一个补链一个

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct refreshActivityPlan can prepare a delist-and-refill strategy card without executing writes.

routing.evidenceSummary: The compound execution intent must remain bounded by planning and confirmation; direct NL execution is not dependable.

cases.utterance: 先查一下2026013022000994654214的端内id是多少,然后根据这个id铺四条链接

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct product resolution can find the ID needed before a copy-link planning step.

routing.evidenceSummary: The cross-tool reference from resolved ID to later copy-link action is not reliably preserved.

cases.utterance: 近15天曝光为0的有哪些?下架,并且补链这些id

capability.evidenceSummary: Direct window aggregation can produce the candidate set needed before a refresh plan.

routing.evidenceSummary: The aggregate-result-to-execution candidate handoff is a metadata continuity risk.
